description_long: This is a softcover book with a predominantly black and gray cover, featuring a technical illustration and two crossed swords on the front. The book is relatively thin, with a rectangular shape and a flat spine. The front cover displays a detailed line drawing of a mechanical object and a rendered 3D model, suggesting a focus on modeling or design. The back and spine are plain, with no visible text or decoration. The book appears to be made of standard paper with a printed cover, and the edges are crisp and straight. The overall appearance is that of a modern instructional or reference book.
description: A thin, softcover book with a black and gray cover featuring technical illustrations and crossed swords. The design is modern and clean, with a plain spine and back.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing technical illustrations and two crossed swords, with a black and gray color scheme.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting its thinness and the plain, light-colored spine.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, which is plain and gray with no visible text or imagery.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the opposite side, again emphasizing its thin profile and the lack of detail on the spine.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features a technical line drawing of a mechanical object alongside a rendered 3D model, both in a realistic and instructional style. Below these, two crossed swords are depicted, adding a thematic element related to modeling or game assets. The overall illustration is clean and precise, emphasizing technical detail.
attribute_title_text: AN INTRODUCTION TO MODELLING WITH WINGS 3D
attribute_spine_design: The spine is plain and light gray, with no visible text or decorative elements. It appears unadorned and simple.
